use std::env;

// BAD: process-global env mutation used as runtime control flow
fn set_feature_flag(key: &str, value: bool) {
    env::set_var(key, if value { "1" } else { "0" });
}

fn is_feature_enabled(key: &str) -> bool {
    env::var(key).map(|v| v == "1").unwrap_or(false)
}

fn handle_request(request: &Request) -> Response {
    if request.path == "/admin/enable-search" {
        set_feature_flag("ENABLE_SEARCH", true);
        return Response::ok();
    }

    if is_feature_enabled("ENABLE_SEARCH") {
        return search_handler(request);
    }

    legacy_handler(request)
}
